items.title: Andrew Yang thinks the next big startup opportunity is lowering the cost of living
items.summary: Andrew Yang made a list of everything Americans overpay for — housing, food, wireless — and thinks the next startup gold rush is giving that money back.

items.title: Anthropic’s safety warnings may have just backfired — the government has pulled the plug on its most powerful AI
items.summary: Anthropic isn't hiding its frustration. "We disagree that the finding of a narrow potential jailbreak should be cause for recalling a commercial model deployed to hundreds of millions of people," the company wrote in a blog post.

items.title: SpaceX IPO: Live updates on everything you need to know
items.summary: TechCrunch has followed SpaceX's start, struggles, and successes from the early days. And we're here for what happens next too. This package of SpaceX IPO coverage includes who stands to win (and maybe some who won't), pre-IPO deals, and what's tucked inside its S-1 registration document.

items.title: Meta’s months-old AI unit is a soul-crushing gulag, say the engineers stuck inside it
items.summary: A new report suggests the unit, which employs 6,500 people, is on the verge of revolt.

items.title: Chinese cybercrime operation that used AI to scam ‘hundreds of thousands of victims’ sued by Google
items.summary: The tech giant said a group called "Outsider Enterprise" used AI to scam hundreds of thousands of victims, sending 2.5 million text messages over a span of two weeks.

items.title: SpaceX IPO closes up 19% and delivers the world’s first trillionaire
items.summary: The company made its heavily anticipated debut on Friday, trading higher than its initial $135 IPO price.

items.title: SpaceX president Gwynne Shotwell just gave another hint at a Tesla merger
items.summary: A SpaceX-Tesla merger seems inevitable.

items.title: Mistral is rumored to be raising €3B at €20B valuation
items.summary: The funding round would value the company at around €20 billion (about $23.15 billion), nearly double its Series C valuation of €11.7 billion.

items.title: Robinhood sees ‘record-breaking’ traffic after SpaceX stock debuts
items.summary: The trading platform says some customers experienced intermittent disruptions, but those issues have resolved.

items.title: SpaceX, Anthropic, and OpenAI’s hot IPO summer
items.summary: The IPO market is back, and it’s not the same companies leading the charge. FAANG had a good run, but a new acronym is taking over: MANGOS — Meta (or Microsoft, depending on who you ask), Anthropic, Nvidia, Google, OpenAI, and SpaceX. Half of that bunch is heading to public markets in the same window, and it’s a stress test for investors, for valuations, and for […]

items.title: Elon Musk becomes the world’s first trillionaire after SpaceX’s historic IPO
items.summary: The SpaceX IPO has boosted Musk's paper wealth to more than $1,000,000,000,000 at a time when he is more hated -- and powerful -- than ever.

items.title: US surveillance law to expire for first time after lawmakers reject Trump’s controversial pick to lead spy agencies
items.summary: The spy law known as Section 702, which authorizes the NSA and FBI's warrantless surveillance, will all but certainly expire on Friday for the first time.

items.title: Cheaper, faster, and culturally aware, Avataar’s video AI is built for India’s scale
items.summary: Avataar AI's distilled video model is priced at $0.005 for every second of generation.

items.title: Equal AI raises $30M to screen calls so Indians don’t have to
items.summary: Equal AI said that its AI-powered call assistant now has over a million monthly active users.

items.title: Theker just raised $85M to build the factory robot that doesn’t specialize in anything
items.summary: Unlike humanoid robots designed around a fixed form — think Boston Dynamics — Theker's machines are built to be reconfigured.

items.title: Jeff Bezos’s Prometheus raises $12B to build an ‘artificial general engineer’ for the physical world
items.summary: The new round values the physical AI startup that aims to automate heavy engineering and drug design at $41 billion.

items.title: SpaceX officially prices shares at $135 in the largest IPO ever
items.summary: Wits its official share pricing announcement, SpaceX's IPO has begun.

items.title: Oracle warns of security bug that hackers abused to breach 100+ companies
items.summary: The tech giant warned of a security flaw that a cybercrime gang said it's exploiting as part of a mass-hacking campaign. Google said it notified more than 100 organizations that had potentially vulnerable servers.

items.title: SpaceX SPV investors won’t know their true holdings until post-IPO lock-ups lift
items.summary: After SpaceX makes its public debut, lower-tier SPV investors face hidden fees, lengthy payout delays, and the  risk of outright fraud.

items.title: Bluesky launches group chats, as company shifts focus to community features
items.summary: Bluesky's latest feature is group chats, arriving amid a shift in focus on building features for smaller communities.
